title: phaeanthus glabrescens
intro: Phaeanthus glabrescens, also known as the Chinese waxflower or Chinese angel's trumpet, is a plant species native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Phaeanthus glabrescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its extracts are also used in pharmaceutical applications to create various medicinal products.
